card.name: Harry Potter the Gathering Commander Decks WWHP
card.text: Corruption of the Dark Arts GUBR Commander: Delphini Diggory, Dark Heir Theme: Commit a crime and opponent manipulation (Targeting opponents, anything they control, and/or cards in their graveyards is a crime.) Fantastic Beasts & Where to Find Them RGWB Commander: Qilin, Elector of the Supreme Mugwump Theme: Beasts Tribal, Monarch Group Hug Ministry Crackdown WUBR Commander:Rufus Scrimger, Auror Minister Theme: Control Guardians of the Phoenix RWGU Commander: Alaster Moody, Keeper of the Order of the Phoenix Theme: Bolstering creatures on the field

card.name: WWHP Archetypes 2 WWHP
card.text: GRYFFINDOR RGW Gallant x (Whenever a creature an opponent controls with greater power enters or attacks and that creature isn’t courageous, put x +1/+1 counters on that creature and it becomes courageous.) As long as this creature is courageous, it gains [effect] HUFFLEPUFF WBG Dedication X (Whenever this creature attacks, you may pay {X}. If you do it gets +1/+1 for each creature you control until end of turn.) Variant: Dedication to X (Whenever this creature attacks, you may pay {X}. If you do it gets +1/+1 for each creature you control of the chosen type you control until end of turn.) (Tribal Beast, Plant, or Wizard) RAVENCLAW URW Studious (Whenever you draw a card, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If this is the third time this effect has resolved this turn and this creature isn’t studious, it becomes studious.) SLYTHERIN GBU Soulbond (You may pair {this_or_that(“creature”)} with another unpaired creature when either enters. They remain paired for as long as you control both of them.) As long as this creature is paired, [effect] THE DARK ARTS UBR Commit a crime & Villainous choice (Targeting opponents, anything they control, and/or cards in their graveyards is a crime.) [Trigger] {that player_or each opponent} faces a villainous choice — [effect 1] or [effect 2} Bewitchments WUBRG (Non creatures) Bewitchment Storm (hen you cast this spell, copy it for each bewitchment spell cast before it this turn.{ if is_targeted() then “ You may choose new targets for the copies.” }{if not is_spell(card.type) then “ Copies become tokens.”} Auras, Conjurations, Curses, Horcruxs, Incantations, Lessons, and Potions are Bewitchments.) Beasts WGRUB (Creatures) Squad X (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may pay X any number of times. When this creature enters, create that many tokens that are copies of it.)

card.name: WWHP Archetypes 1 WWHP
card.text: {W/U}:Divination Scry and Card Draw {W/B}:History of Magic Historic (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) {R/W}:DADA Shield counters (If a permanent with a shield counter on it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) {G/W}:Transfiguration Alteration X (You may cast this face down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. Its controller may cast it from the battlefield for {X}.) {U/B}:Dark arts: Commit a crime (Targeting opponents, anything they control, and/or cards in their graveyards is a crime.) {U/R}:Charms: Incantations tribal {G/U}:Potions Brew (You may reveal a Potion card you own from outside the game and put it into your hand, or exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn.) {B/R}: Alchemy: Turn resources into Treasure tokens {B/G}: Herbology Plant tribal {R/G}: Care of Magical Creatures: Beast tribal

card.name: Bird WWHP
card.text: Flying

card.name: Ministry Tribunal WWHP
card.text: Vigilance
card.reverse-related: [Trial of the Wizengamot // Creation of Dumoldore's Army]

card.name: Owl WWHP
card.text: Defender, Flying Whenever this token enters, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It’s an artifact with “{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.”)

card.name: Student WWHP
card.text: Scholarly (Whenever you draw a card, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If this is the third time this ability has resolved this turn, this creature becomes studious if it isn’t already.)
card.reverse-related: [Trial of the Wizengamot // Creation of Dumoldore's Army] [Receipt of Hogwarts Letter // Hogwarts, School of Witchcraft & Wizardry] [Welcome to the Wizarding World // Diagon Alley, Center for all Wizarding Needs]

card.name: Bubotuber Token WWHP
card.text: Squad {G} — Discard a card Defender BG, {T}: Each opponent loses 1 life. You gain life equal to the amount lost this way.

card.name: Book WWHP
card.text: Flying Whenever this token deals combat damage to a player sacrifice it. You draw a card.
card.reverse-related: [Explore the Restricted Section // Hogwart's Hidden Map Room] [Madam Pince, School Librarian]

card.name: Cornish Pixie Token WWHP
Doxy Token WWHP
card.text: Squad GU Flying, Defender Infect Whenever you are dealt damage, this creature loses defender until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Swarm of Grindylows Token WWHP
card.text: Squad {12/U} Skulk (This creature can’t be blocked by creatures with greater power.)

card.name: Death Eater Token WWHP
card.text: Squad 2B Whenever you commit a crime, each opponent loses 1 life unless they pay {1}. You gain life equal to the amount lost this way.

card.name: Inferi Hoard Token WWHP
card.text: Squad—Pay 4 life Decayed. (This creature can’t block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Matagot Familiar Token WWHP
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent loses 1 life, you gain life equal to the amount of life lost this way. Whenever a player commits a crime or casts a nonpermanent spell that targets this creature, create a token that’s a copy of this creature. This ability only triggers once each turn. (Targeting opponents, anything they control, and/or cards in their graveyards is a crime.)

card.name: Rat WWHP
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a Treasure token.

card.name: Skeleton WWHP
card.reverse-related: [Durmstrang Prefect] [Portkey to Little Hangleton Graveyard // Charmed Skeleton]

card.name: Snake WWHP
card.text: Deathtouch
card.reverse-related: [Serpensortia] [Serpensortia] [Tom Riddle, Prodigal Orphan // Voldemort, The Darklord]

card.name: Thestral Token WWHP
card.text: Flying

card.name: Wizard-Cracker Imp Token WWHP
card.text: Squad 1B 1BB, {T}: Create a Wizard-Cracker token.

card.name: Blast Ended Screwt Token WWHP
card.text: Squad RR Trample, menace Whenever this creature deals combat damage to another creature, if you control this creature, tap the other creature and put a stun counter on it. 2RRR, {T}: This creature deals damage equal to its power divided among any number of target permanents.

card.name: Dragon WWHP
card.text: Flying Fire breath — {R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Red Cap Tower Guard Token WWHP
card.text: Squad RW This creature and each token copy of it enter with a shield on them if you created at least one token copy. All creatures able to block this creature do so.

card.name: Salamander Beast WWHP
card.text: {R/G}, {T}: Regenerate this token. 1R: This token gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Bowtruckle Token WWHP
card.text: Squad 2G Whenever this creature enters, return up to one target enchantment or Incantation card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Chinese Chomping Cabbage Token WWHP
card.text: Flash Squad {12/G}. When this creature enters, if you paid GG to cast it, it deals damage equal to its power to any target.

card.name: Insect Manticore WWHP
card.text: Deathtouch

card.name: Mallowseet WWHP
card.text: Defender {1}, {T}, Sacrifice a land: Search your library for up to two basic lands and put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {2}, {T}: Add a number of one color of mana equal to the number of lands in your graveyard.

card.name: Puffskein Token WWHP
card.text: Squad 2/GG {T}: Puffskein deals 1 damage to target creature with flying.

card.name: Spider WWHP
card.text: Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.)

card.name: Steeler Snail Token WWHP
card.text: Squad GG This creature enters tapped. When this creature enters, it deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent control.

card.name: Stoneback Dugbog Token WWHP
Vampyr Mosp Token WWHP
card.text: Squad 4GG Flying This token gets +1/+1 for each creature named Vampyr Mosp and costs {1} less to cast for each plant you control. Whenever a Plant creature you control enters, create a token copy of this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Worm WWHP
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Animated Torch Token WWHP
card.text: Alteration XXXW Flying, Defender {R}, {T}: This creature deals damage to target creature equal to the number of creatures that share a name with it. Activate only if you were dealt damage this turn.

card.name: Clue WWHP
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Food WWHP
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Portkey WWHP
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature you control phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don’t exist until its controller’s next turn.)

card.name: Potion WWHP
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this Potion: You may activate a Recipe ability of a permanent you control without paying its activation cost.

card.name: Treasure WWHP
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Wizard Cracker WWHP
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Put a -1/-1 counter on target creature.

card.name: append Set Code To Tokens WWHP
card.text: This token can be used to represent a copy of something else.
